caption: it’s always hard to choose where to eat in tokyo because there are so many options!!!
transcript: Everyone always talks about the viral food spots in Japan, but hot take, I don't know, I think it's more fun just frolicking around and coming across random restaurants So this is everything I ate in 24 hours in Tokyo, but everything was totally unplanned starting off at the Kyo mall I didn't even know they had all of these restaurants here But then something smelled so good and it was these little baby croissants Anything mini I cannot pass up so grow you know I had to go try at least one and then a couple stores down I saw this udon place selling cod ro udon and I was specifically craving that because that was my favorite item on the Marogami menu, but then they took it off and this one looked identical, but then I gave it a try and It was okay. I also got to try my mini croissants I got the sweet potato flavor and for 60 cents that was good Then I made my way to this little matcha shop I can't really drink matcha because it makes me go insane due to the caffeine content But I did pick up a couple of cans for my dad and then we also got a matcha ice cream So I took just the bite and it was really good before heading to Shibuya where we randomly found this Lock-sitained cafe that overlooked the Shibuya crossing so we grabbed a chocolate cake there It was a little pricey, but I don't know worth the view maybe and then after roaming around We ended up at this ramen spot in a random mall and I saw they had a kids meal So I got that I came with apple juice and Miffy utensils and my favorite snack Okay, but for a kid meal that was huge walk the food off at the arcade one thing I really wanted to try was the McDonald's in Japan Specifically their shrimp item so I got a shrimp burger They also had shrimp nuggets, but I was like I'm gonna get them another time and I never did so I'm sad I also tried a couple of my mojis snacks because I bought so many then for Zinnah We ended up getting chicken skewers had interesting flavors So I ordered a taco yaki flavor and then a Thai skewer and that is everything I ate in a day in Tokyo
